name: Bug Report (Broken Snippet)
about: Create a report to help us fix a broken cheat sheet or syntax error.
title: "[BUG] "
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## 🐛 Bug Description

A clear and concise description of what the bug is. Did a command fail to run? Was an Nmap flag deprecated? Was there a syntax typo?

## Reproducing the Error

1. I copied snippet: `[insert snippet here]`
2. I ran it inside environment: `[Docker/Linux/Windows]`
3. I received this error: 
   ```bash
   [paste error output here]
   ```

## Expected Behavior

A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen instead.

## Environment:

- OS: [e.g. Kali Linux, Ubuntu 22.04]
- Tool Version: [e.g. Docker 24.0.5, Nmap 7.93]

## Additional Context

Add any other context about the problem here.
